mapper.select: SELECT id, title, user_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM conversation WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, user_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE conversation
title = #{title},
updated_at = #{updatedAt},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM conversation WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(1) as value FROM conversation WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') as weekStart, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') as weekEnd, COUNT(1) as value FROM conversation WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{weeks} WEEK) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY weekStart, weekEnd ORDER BY weekStart

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') as yearMonth, COUNT(1) as value FROM conversation WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY yearMonth
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM conversation WHERE is_deleted = false
